content.rendered:
[vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1500556319702{background-color: #eeeeec !important;}”][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-offset-2 vc_col-lg-8 vc_col-md-offset-1 vc_col-md-10″]

[vc_column_text]

Setting up a commercial restaurant requires a great deal of effort and planning for a smooth and hassle-free operation of all procedures on a daily basis. One key part of the entire structure is the installation of a fire suppression system, which is innovative and highly efficient. Being equipped with this solution means you can reduce fire safety hazards and control a fire breakout before it causes damage and leads to loss of life and property. As a responsible business owner, you need to prioritize the safety of your property, staff and guests.

The risk of fire in a commercial kitchen or restaurant is very common. In fact, many business owners had to suffer heavy financial losses or shut down their operation altogether as a result of fire accidents.

>A fire suppression system is designed to knock down fires in the initial stage. It is made up of multiple components or a group of units that extinguish fire through the application of a substance. The main role of this solution is to detect the warning signals of a likely fire due to heat, smoke and grease buildup. Kitchen and cooking equipment as well as electrical equipment often present fire hazards, which are effectively reduced by using and installing a fire protection system.

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column]
[/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-7 vc_col-md-7″][vc_column_text]

Hood Builder Recommends Pyrochem Fire Suppression System

For top-grade fire protection, it is crucial to select and invest in an innovative solution that has been engineered to protect the ventilating hood, exhaust duct, grease filters, and cooking appliances effectively.

At Hood Builder, we have been outfitting commercial kitchens and restaurants with fire suppression systems for over two decades. Based on our in-depth knowledge and years of experience, we know the specific fire prevention needs of a commercial restaurant better than anyone else. That is why we recommend Pyrochem to maintain a fire-free environment in your facility.

Pyrochem is a well-known brand in the fire protection industry. It is one of the leading systems to safeguard your restaurant, employees, and visitors against the dangers of fire. Not just in the hospitality industry, this solution is preferred for use even in industrial areas with high risks of fire. We sell as well as carry specialization in the installation and maintenance of Pyrochem products. The system is meticulously designed to stop fires and prevent it from re-igniting.

Why You Should Install Pyrochem

The Pyrochem Kitchen Knight II fire suppression system is an ideal match for the level of fire safety a commercial kitchen needs against hazards. The solution is engineered to be flexible to suit the varying needs of restaurants. It uses new-age technology to knock down flames. The system uses an advanced wet chemical distribution technique. The chemical agent is potassium carbonate-based that dismantles flame and cuts off the air supply to stop grease fire.

In addition to stopping grease fire, the Pyrochem system also cools down the hazard area to keep fire out. The Kitchen Knight II system has been proven and tested to work with the highest degree of effectiveness.

The Pyrochem restaurant fire suppression system has UL testing approval for protecting all grease extracting and cooking equipment. At Hood Builder, our professionals have been specially trained in the accurate installation, design, and maintenance of this fire suppression system. Each component of the Kitchen Knight II system has gone through comprehensive improvements in order to provide restaurant owners with the most effective fire protection for cooking appliances. The solution comes along with enhanced nozzles, full cone spray, individual swipe adaptors, and chrome caps, which together make it very robust and effective. Most of all, the Pyrochem system is designed to suit the budget of restaurant owners.

The Pyrochem Kitchen Knight II system features dual capability: automatic and manual. The automatic fire detection and activation controls offer 24-hour protection against different kinds of fire safety hazards. On the other hand, the manual actuation system functions as a backup for the automatic controls. This can be used to stop and control fire at the very first sight.

The Pyrochem Kitchen Knight II system comes with a lot of flexibility to suit the different needs of restaurants. It can be customized to fit in as per the layout of the appliances in the commercial kitchen.

Hood Builder: Your Most Ideal Pyrochem Installation Partner

The installation of Pyrochem products is a complicated procedure, which requires the skills and knowledge of experts. Each component of the system should be set up in an accurate manner for best performance.

If you are planning to outfit your commercial kitchen with a Pyrochem fire protection system, you should rely only on experts. At Hood Builder, we have customized and installed this solution in a wide range of commercial kitchens in restaurants, schools, cafeterias, diners, catering facilities, etc. We have sound expertise in the setup of the entire Pyrochem Kitchen Knight II system.

Also, you don’t need to look anywhere else for the inspection and maintenance of the Pyrochem fire prevention system. We deal in, install and maintain Pyrichem products for restaurants in a professional manner.

Get a Free Estimate

Before you add the Pyrochem fire protection system to your commercial kitchen, you should have a clear idea of how much it is going to cost. This solution is not only flexible and highly effective, but it is also budget-friendly. If you are running a restaurant or foodservice business already or planning to start one, you should never ignore the dangers of fire. Feel free to discuss your specific needs with one of our specialists to know what to expect. For your free estimate, you can reach out to us via a phone call or send us an email using the contact form on our website.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-offset-1 vc_col-lg-4 vc_col-md-offset-1 vc_col-md-4″][vc_wp_custommenu nav_menu=”14″ el_class=”wps-sidebar-related-links” title=”Related Links”]

[/vc_column][vc_column]
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”wps-full-width”][vc_column]
Get a Free Quote

We’ve got you covered. Hood Builder is a leading distribution, fabrication, and installation company for food facilities of any size. We have offices and plants across the United States that are ready to tend to your needs.

If you intend on receiving quotes from other installers in the industry, please be sure to compare the items included in the package in addition to price and reputation. Our objective is to always be your obvious choice. Please fill out the form below and and we will prepare a quote.

For a Full and Fast price Quote, Contact Hood Builder today at 303-777-7720.
